subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Upon thee be My glory! Some time ago thy mention flowed from the Most Exalted Pen, and likewise from before that time, the Kawthar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد علیک بهائی چندی قبل ذکرت از قلم اعلی جاری و همچنین از قبل قبل امروز کوثر
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
